evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implement data quality tests and participate in ensuring the accuracy and reliability of data pipelines; Follow and contribute to analytical engineering standards and best practices; Maintain clear documentation and apply strong coding best practices
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Quality, reliability, standards, documentation, and best practices dominate the JD—accuracy and reliability take priority over shipping speed.
evidence.domain_risk: Help drive analysis, data science, and reporting across many diverse data sets; This work will directly inform and influence multiple division's strategies
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Role supports business and data-driven decisions across multiple divisions without explicit financial or compliance language.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Data and Analytics Center of Excellence; semantic layer for data analysts and scientists; develop world-class data science, machine learning, and statistical solutions
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Established data function with named team structure (Center of Excellence), multiple roles (analysts, scientists), and specialized infrastructure suggests mid-stage maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Write clean, efficient SQL queries and support the creation of reliable data structures; working with raw data sets that leads to development of logical and physical data models; Implement data quality tests and participate in ensuring the accuracy and reliability of data pipelines
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technical context (logical/physical data models, semantic layers, data quality tests, reliable data structures) shows hiring manager detail about actual engineering work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Collaborating with analysts and business users; serve as an internal expert about the data; Participate in requirement-gathering sessions from business, product, and software stakeholders
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Primary focus is supporting internal data consumers and analytics/science teams—internal data platform orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Assist in analyzing; Follow and contribute under the guidance of senior team members; help prepare analytical datasets; Participate in requirement-gathering
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Role receives scoped work and executes with guidance, supporting senior team members and fulfilling business requests without strategic ownership framing.
evidence.ai_role: Help drive analysis, data science, and machine learning across many diverse data sets; developing world-class data science, machine learning solutions; develop semantic layer that helps to create dashboards and models
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Candidate builds data infrastructure and semantic layers that enable downstream data science and ML work, indicating ai_enabler role.
evidence.testing_framing: Implement data quality tests and participate in ensuring the accuracy and reliability of data pipelines
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality and testing are framed as owned responsibilities where candidate participates in ensuring reliability, not just knowledge of tools.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Implement data quality tests; ensuring the accuracy and reliability of data pipelines; reliable data structures; accuracy and reliability of data pipelines
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate emphasis on operational reliability through testing and accuracy—fear is pipeline failures and data accuracy issues, not compliance or regulatory risk.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: working with raw data sets that leads to development of logical and physical data models; support the creation of reliable data structures; prepare analytical datasets; design / building of semantic layer
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Dominant verbs focus on building data models and structures rather than establishing from zero or maintaining existing—fix_scale orientation.
evidence.loss_aversion: Implement data quality tests; ensure the accuracy and reliability of data pipelines. Role emphasizes operational reliability and data accuracy for supporting analytics and business teams.
